name: lurie-glass
message: Lurie Glass has been providing high-quality glass and glazing services to southern Wisconsin since 1914. Headquartered in Milwaukee, the company serves both residential and commercial clients, showcasing expertise in complex architectural designs. They also operate Lurie Panels, a leading manufacturer specializing in custom laminating. Lurie Glass is recognized for its contributions to notable projects, including collaborations with renowned architects and significant cultural landmarks
